scope.summary: G1 F-D1 residual: the harness subject-mapping fix that makes connect-as-IAM-principal work against ADB Identity Domains. The bootstrap maps IAM_PRINCIPAL_NAME=<domain-qualified principal name> (not the raw OCID); the terraform harness extracts the token's userName claim and refuses a mismatch before creating any mapping; the signoff harness drives the IAM doctor + guarded SELECT USER FROM DUAL. Three non-negotiable invariants verified in code: (1) IAM token refused over non-TCPS before reaching the driver (iam_token.rs:765, test inject_refuses_non_tcps_transport at :1125); (2) token_exec refused before spawn (iam_token.rs:1716); (3) token values never persisted, rendered, or logged (iam_token.rs:9-12 discipline, enforced throughout).
out_of_scope: The live signoff run against a real Always-Free ADB (operator-gated oci_adb_terraform.sh apply-and-signoff; requires OCI credentials not present in this environment).
Driver-side TokenSource seam changes (B16a, closed separately).
Doctor IAM posture observation (B16b, closed separately).

entry_points.name: Offline contract tests (harness mapping safety contract)
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test e2e_harness -- oci_adb_terraform_dry_run real_adb_signoff_dry_run: 2 passed, 0 failed. These pin the harness mapping contract: bootstrap maps IAM_PRINCIPAL_NAME=<name> (not OCID), terraform extracts userName claim and refuses mismatch, signoff drives IAM doctor + guarded query.

entry_points.name: Non-TCPS refusal invariant
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib -- inject_refuses_non_tcps_transport inject_sets_options_token_over_tcps: both pass. iam_token.rs:765 returns IamTokenError::NonTcpsTransport before the driver is reached.

entry_points.name: token_exec refused before spawn
entry_points.trace: iam_token.rs:1716: a token_exec on a plaintext transport is refused BEFORE the command is spawned. Verified by code inspection; the test suite covers the non-TCPS refusal path.

entry_points.name: Fix commits (source SHAs)
entry_points.trace: 4c0a5cc4 fix(oci): align IAM harness mapping evidence (oraclemcp-he7t) — bootstrap maps IAM_PRINCIPAL_NAME=<name>, terraform validates userName claim, signoff harness updated. 0a144c4a fix(v6z2): split OCI IAM bootstrap from guarded probe. 0829fde3 fix(core): configure IAM token profiles as refreshable sources (B16a TokenSource seam).

limitations: The live signoff against a real Always-Free ADB (operator-gated oci_adb_terraform.sh apply-and-signoff) was not run in this session: no OCI credentials present. The operator will run it separately. The code fix and offline contract are complete and verified.
The live signoff evidence will be captured under target/e2e (gitignored, confidentiality-clean) when the operator runs the gated lane.
